name: energy-heatmap
description: Heatmap of average energy consumption by hour and weekday from 4000+ rows
messages: Create a heatmap showing average energy consumption by hour of day and day of week
rubric: Must use cell mark with x=hour, y=weekday, fill=consumption_kwh. Must aggregate (groupX mean or similar) since there are multiple buildings and weeks per hour×weekday combo. Weekday ordering should be correct (Mon-Sun). Sequential color scheme expected.
